description_long: This helmet features a sleek, angular design with a metallic gold faceplate and a deep red exterior shell, reminiscent of advanced, high-tech protective gear. The front faceplate has sharply defined eye slits and a contoured jawline, giving it a distinctive, almost robotic appearance. The sides of the helmet are adorned with circular, raised ear covers and subtle panel lines, suggesting reinforced construction. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with faint scuff marks and wear patterns visible on the red surface, indicating use or exposure to harsh environments. The overall finish is glossy, with light reflecting off the gold and red surfaces, enhancing its futuristic aesthetic. There are no visible ventilation openings, logos, or graphic designs, and the helmet appears to be a solid, protective shell.
description: A glossy, angular helmet with a gold faceplate and deep red shell, featuring a robotic, high-tech appearance and no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold faceplate with sharp eye slits and a contoured jawline, highlighting the helmet's robotic look.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the circular ear cover, panel lines, and the smooth, glossy red shell with some surface wear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded, seamless back of the helmet with visible scuff marks and no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear cover, panel lines, and the transition between gold and red surfaces.
